body_txt: A heartwarming story told through the ages: Something unique enters a young woman/man's life, and they form a bond that changes them forever, usually starting them down the path to adulthood. What that something is , however, varies widely. From the classic "A Boy and His Dog" , all the way to… well, keep reading, you'll see. Be warned, however, that whatever X is can easily fall victim to Death by Newbery Medal , especially if it's of the huge and/or monstrous variety. See also Interspecies Friendship , Monster and the Maiden , Loyal Animal Companion and Non-Human Sidekick .
